title: Section 61
content: Any goods used for concealing any 1[narcotic drug, psychotropic substance] or controlled substance which is liable to confiscation under this Act shall also be liable to confiscation. Explanation.-- In this section "goods" does not include conveyance as a means of transport.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 27, ibid., for "narcotic drug or psychotropic substance" (w.e.f. 2-10-2001).
